sql_array: CREATE TABLE event_schedule (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL HOUR TO MINUTE);
INSERT INTO event_schedule (event_id, event_time, duration) VALUES (1, '2023-10-10 14:00:00', INTERVAL '1:30');
UPDATE event_schedule SET duration = INTERVAL '2:00' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time, duration FROM event_schedule WHERE duration > INTERVAL '1:00';
SELECT event_id, event_time + duration AS end_time FROM event_schedule;
